debug_info.goal:
case neg
x : IGame
p : Player
z : IGame
hy : z ∈ moves p x
h : ¬@IGame.Reversible x z p
⊢ ¬@IGame.Reversible (@IGame.unreverse x) (@IGame.unreverse z) p

failed_attempts:
intro h'
    cases p <;> simpa [Reversible, unreverse_equiv x] using h'

intro h'
    rcases h'.choose_spec with ⟨hm, hle⟩
    exact h ⟨z.unreverse, mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible hy h, hle⟩

intro h'
    cases p <;> rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
    · exact h ⟨unreverse w, by
        have : unreverse w ∈ unreverse '' reverseSet x y left :=
          ⟨w, by simpa [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] using hw, rfl⟩
        exact by
          have : unreverse w ∈ x.unreverseᴿ := by
            simpa [moves_unreverse] using (Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 ⟨y, hy, this⟩)
          simpa [moves_unreverse] using this,
        (unreverse_equiv w).1.trans hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).2⟩
    · exact h ⟨unreverse w, by
        have : unreverse w ∈ unreverse '' reverseSet x y right :=
          ⟨w, by simpa [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] using hw, rfl⟩
        exact by
          have : unreverse w ∈ x.unreverseᴸ := by
            simpa [moves_unreverse] using (Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 ⟨y, hy, this⟩)
          simpa [moves_unreverse] using this,
        (unreverse_equiv x).1.trans hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv w).2⟩

have hz' : unreverse (unreverse z) ∈ x.unreverse.moves p :=
        by
          rw [moves_unreverse]
          refine Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 ⟨z, hy, ?_⟩
          refine Set.mem_image_of_mem _ this
      exact not_reversible_unreverse hz' h'
    · exact h'

intro h'
    have : y ∈ x.unreverse.moves p := mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible hy h
    exact h this

intro h'
    have : Reversible x z p := by
      cases p <;>
        simpa [Reversible, unreverse_equiv x, unreverse_equiv z] using h'
    exact h this

intro h'
    cases p <;> rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩ <;>
      refine h ?_ <;>
      exact ⟨w, by simpa using hw, (unreverse_equiv _).1 hwx⟩

intro h'
    cases p <;>
      simpa [Reversible, unreverse_equiv x, unreverse_equiv y] using h'

intro hr
    have : Reversible x z p := by
      cases p with
      | left =>
          rcases hr with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
          refine ⟨w, ?_, ?_⟩
          ·
            have hw' : w ∈ (unreverse z)ᴿ := hw
            simpa [moves_unreverse] using hw'
          ·
            have hx : unreverse x ≈ x := unreverse_equiv x
            have hz' : unreverse z ≈ z := unreverse_equiv z
            exact (hz'.le_iff_le.mp (hwle.trans hx.le))
      | right =>
          rcases hr with ⟨w, hw, hlew⟩
          refine ⟨w, ?_, ?_⟩
          ·
            have hw' : w ∈ (unreverse z)ᴸ := hw
            simpa [moves_unreverse] using hw'
          ·
            have hx : unreverse x ≈ x := unreverse_equiv x
            have hz' : unreverse z ≈ z := unreverse_equiv z
            exact (hx.ge.trans (hlew.trans (hz'.ge_iff_ge.mp (le_rfl))))
    exact h this

intro h'
    have : Reversible x y p := by
      cases p
      · rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩
        refine ⟨w, ?_, ?_⟩
        · have : w ∈ (unreverse y)ᴿ := hw
          simpa [moves_neg] using this
        · have hx : x.unreverse ≤ w := hwx
          have hx' : x ≤ w := (unreverse_equiv x).1.trans hx
          exact hx'
      · rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hxw⟩
        refine ⟨w, ?_, ?_⟩
        · have : w ∈ (unreverse y)ᴸ := hw
          simpa using this
        · have hx : w ≤ x.unreverse := hxw
          have hx' : w ≤ x := hx.trans (unreverse_equiv x).2
          exact hx'
    exact h this

intro h'
    cases p with
    | left =>
        rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
        rw [unreverse_def, le_def] at hwle
        rcases hwle with ⟨hwL, hwR⟩
        rcases hwR _ hw with ⟨t, ht, htt⟩
        have : Reversible x y Player.left := by
          refine ⟨t, ?_, ?_⟩
          · simpa using ht
          · exact (unreverse_equiv t).ge.trans (htt.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)
        exact h this
    | right =>
        rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hxw⟩
        rw [unreverse_def, le_def] at hxw
        rcases hxw with ⟨hxwL, hxwR⟩
        rcases hxwL _ hw with ⟨t, ht, htt⟩
        have : Reversible x y Player.right := by
          refine ⟨t, ?_, ?_⟩
          · simpa using ht
          · exact (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (htt.trans (unreverse_equiv t).le)
        exact h this

intro h'
    cases p <;> simpa [Reversible, moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] using h'

intro h'
    have : Reversible x y p := by
      cases p <;>
      · rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
        · refine ⟨unreverse w, ?_, ?_⟩
          · exact Subposition.mem_moves_of_subposition (.unreverse (.of_mem_moves hw))
          · simpa using hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le
        · refine ⟨unreverse w, ?_, ?_⟩
          · exact Subposition.mem_moves_of_subposition (.unreverse (.of_mem_moves hw))
          · simpa using (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans hwle
    exact (h this).elim

    rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
    refine h ?_
    refine ⟨w, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa [unreverse_def] using hw
    · simpa [unreverse_equiv x, unreverse_equiv z] using hwle

    cases p <;>
      simpa [IGame.Reversible, reversible_left, reversible_right] using hrev

intro h'
    have : Reversible x y p := by
      simpa [unreverse_equiv x, unreverse_equiv y] using h'
    exact h this

intro hrev
    cases p with
    | left =>
        rcases hrev with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
        have hw' : w ∈ (unreverse y).moves right := by simpa using hw
        have : (unreverse y).unreverse ≤ unreverse x := by
          simpa [unreverse_equiv] using hwle
        exact h ⟨(unreverse y).unreverse, hw', this⟩
    | right =>
        rcases hrev with ⟨w, hw, hlex⟩
        have hw' : w ∈ (unreverse y).moves left := by simpa using hw
        have : unreverse x ≤ (unreverse y).unreverse := by
          simpa [unreverse_equiv] using hlex
        exact h ⟨(unreverse y).unreverse, hw', this⟩

intro hrev
    have := subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (q := p) (x := x) (y := y) (z := hrev.choose) hy
      (hrev.choose_mem_moves)
    cases this with
    | of_mem_moves hm => exact h ⟨_, hm, (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans hrev.choose_le⟩
    | trans _ hxsub =>
        cases hxsub with
        | of_mem_moves hm => exact h ⟨_, hm, (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans hrev.choose_le⟩
        | trans _ hxsub' =>
            cases hxsub' with
            | of_mem_moves hm => exact h ⟨_, hm, (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans hrev.choose_le⟩

intro h'
    rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
    exact h ⟨w, hw, (unreverse_equiv _).le.trans hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv _).ge⟩

intro hrev
    have : unreverse x ≤ unreverse y ∨ unreverse y ≤ unreverse x := by
      cases p <;>
        simpa [Reversible, reversible_left, reversible_right] using
          (hrev.choose_spec.2 : _)
    cases this with
    | inl hle =>
        exact h (by
          cases p with
          | left =>
              rcases hrev with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
              exact ⟨w, hw, (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)⟩
          | right =>
              rcases hrev with ⟨w, hw, hxy⟩
              exact ⟨w, hw, (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hle.trans (unreverse_equiv y).le)⟩)
    | inr hle =>
        exact h (by
          cases p with
          | left =>
              rcases hrev with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
              exact ⟨w, hw, (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hle.trans (unreverse_equiv y).le)⟩
          | right =>
              rcases hrev with ⟨w, hw, hxy⟩
              exact ⟨w, hw, (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hxy.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)⟩)

intro h'
    have : Reversible x z p := by
      cases p <;>
        simpa [Reversible] using h'
    exact h this

intro h'
    rcases (Reversible.choose_spec h') with ⟨hw, hwle⟩
    have : Reversible x z p := by
      cases p with
      | left =>
          refine ⟨h'.choose, ?_, ?_⟩
          · simpa [moves_unreverse] using hw

      | right =>
          refine ⟨h'.choose, ?_, ?_⟩
          · simpa [moves_unreverse] using hw
          · exact (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)
    exact h this

intro hrev
    exact h (by
      simpa [IGame.Reversible, reversible_left, reversible_right] using hrev)

intro h'
    have : Reversible x z p := by
      simpa [unreverse_equiv x, unreverse_equiv z] using h'
    exact h this

intro h'
    rcases p with (_|_)
    · rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
      have : w ∈ yᴿ := by
        have : (-left : Player) = right := rfl
        simpa [Player.cases, this] using hw
      exact h ⟨w, this, (unreverse_equiv w).le.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).ge)⟩
    · rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hxle⟩
      have : w ∈ yᴸ := by
        have : (-right : Player) = left := rfl
        simpa [Player.cases, this] using hw
      exact h ⟨w, this, (unreverse_equiv x).le.trans (hxle.trans (unreverse_equiv w).ge)⟩

intro h'
    cases p <;> simpa [Reversible, unreverse_equiv] using h'

intro h'
    cases p <;>
      · rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
        exact (left_lf hy hw) (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).ge)

intro h'
    have : Reversible x y p := by
      cases p <;>
        rcases h' with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩ <;>
        refine ⟨w, ?_, ?_⟩ <;>
        · simpa [moves_unreverse] using hw
        · have hyu : unreverse y ∈ (unreverse x).moves _ := mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible hy h
          exact (unreverse_equiv w).le.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)
          <;>
        · have hyu : unreverse y ∈ (unreverse x).moves _ := mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible hy h
          exact (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv w).ge)

    have : Reversible x y p := by

intro hrev
    cases p <;> rcases hrev with ⟨w, hw, hwle⟩
    · exact h ⟨w, hw, (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv z).le)⟩
    · exact h ⟨w, hw, (unreverse_equiv z).ge.trans (hwle.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)⟩

intro h'
    have hz' : z.unreverse ∈ reverseSet x.unreverse (unreverse z) p := by
      simpa [reverseSet_of_reversible h'] using h'.choose_mem_moves
    have : Subposition h'.choose x := by
      have := subposition_of_mem_reverseSet (x := x.unreverse) (y := unreverse z) (q := p)
        (hy := mem_moves_unreverse_of_not_reversible (x := x) (y := z) (p := p) hy h) (h := hz')
      exact this.trans (.of_mem_moves hy)
    have hz0 : h'.choose ≤ x := by
      cases p with
      | left =>
          exact h'.choose_le.trans (le_of_subposition this)
      | right =>
          exact (le_of_subposition this).trans h'.le_choose
    exact h ⟨h'.choose, h'.choose_mem_moves, hz0⟩

intro hrev
    have hchoose : hrev.choose ∈ (unreverse z) .moves (-p) := by
      simpa [Reversible.choose_mem_moves] using (Reversible.choose_mem_moves (x := x.unreverse) (y := unreverse z) (p := p) hrev)
    have : Subposition hrev.choose x.unreverse := by
      exact .of_mem_moves hchoose
    cases this with
    | trans a b => cases b
    | of_mem_moves hm =>
      rw [moves_unreverse] at hm
      rcases (Set.mem_iUnion₂.mp hm) with ⟨y, hy', ⟨w, hw, hw'⟩⟩
      have : False := by
        have : w = z := by
          simpa using (Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp hw)
        subst this
        exact (h : ¬ Reversible x z p) (by
          -- witness a reversibility of `z` in `x` from `hrev`
          cases p <;>
            · refine ⟨_, ?_, ?_⟩
              · simpa [moves_unreverse] using hy'
              ·
                -- use equivalence `unreverse x ≈ x` and monotonicity
                -- `hrev.choose` is an option of `unreverse z`, hence of `z`
                have hzsub : Subposition hrev.choose z := by
                  -- `w` was `z` and `hw` gives membership in `reverseSet x z p = {z}`
                  -- so the option comes directly from `z`
                  exact .of_mem_moves (by
                    simpa [moves_unreverse] using hy')
                -- transport the inequality back along equivalences
                -- since `unreverse x ≈ x` and `unreverse z ≈ z`
                -- and `hrev.choose` is a move of `unreverse z`, we can use `hrev`'s inequality
                simpa using (by
                  cases p <;>
                    · exact (Reversible.choose_le (x := x.unreverse) (y := unreverse z) hrev).trans
                        (unreverse_equiv x).le
                    · exact (unreverse_equiv x).ge.trans
                        (Reversible.le_choose (x := x.unreverse) (y := unreverse z) hrev)))
    exact this.elim
